description: Victor Grunder discusses the Slash app, a digital banking platform aimed at small and medium-sized businesses, particularly in the crypto sector. He explains how Slash centralizes financial tools for crypto companies and offers a global USD account for businesses outside the US to manage their finances effectively.
topic_summary: Victor Grunder introduces Slash, a banking platform for crypto and international businesses, highlighting its unique features and competitive advantages in the market [t=31:89].
